ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dispensaries" (
  "dispensary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispensary */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dispensary */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dispensary */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the dispensary is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the dispensary is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the dispensary */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the dispensary */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the dispensary */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dispensary (e.g., Medical Marijuana Dispensary) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the dispensary */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the dispensary's website */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Operating hours of the dispensary */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the dispensary */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date the dispensary was established */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dispensary is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispensary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispensaries_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES dispensary_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispensary_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispensary type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dispensary type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dispensary type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., flowers, concentrates, edibles) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the product (if applicable) */,
  "thc_percentage" REAL /* THC percentage of the product */,
  "cbd_percentage" REAL /* CBD percentage of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispensary_products" (
  "dispensary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispensary */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispensary_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "dispensary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispensary being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dispensary_id FOREIGN KEY ("dispensary_id") REFERENCES dispensaries ("dispensary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "dispensary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispensary */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the dispensary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispensary_id")
)
column_names: City where the dispensary is located
